title: TFS Community
description: Official Tools for Steam community plugin catalog.

plugins.title: Home Assistant
plugins.description: Control Home Assistant rooms, configurable devices, lights, and scenes from Tools for Steam.
plugins.author: Tools for Steam
plugins.changelog: Adds directly draggable Homey-style sliders without visible arrow buttons, including colored tracks for hue, saturation, brightness, and white temperature. Controls remain grouped inside each supported device.

plugins.title: Crackwatch
plugins.description: Browse Hot Games, all cracked games newest first, and personal favorites from CrackRelease with artwork and background updates.
plugins.author: Tools for Steam
plugins.changelog: Starts with Hot Games, adds every cracked game sorted newest to oldest by CrackRelease update date, and improves global multi-word search with a clear action.
